releases.title: collectZ v3.12.12
releases.summary: This patch clarifies Dashboard Review drawer repair flow by labeling the lower editable details section as a manual fallback and adding short type-aware guidance.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Dashboard Review drawers now call the editable lower section `Manual fallback`.
Missing-identifier drawers point users toward lookup first, then manual title or metadata cleanup when that is the better fix.
Missing-cover drawers point users toward cover upload first.
Sparse-metadata drawers keep the fallback fields open with concise guidance to add known descriptive data and leave uncertain values blank.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.11
releases.summary: This patch tightens Dashboard Review drawer saves so Save is only available when there are actual pending updates. No-op submits now keep the drawer open and explain that a change is needed before saving.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Dashboard Review drawers reuse the pending-update comparison as the source of truth for Save readiness.
The Save button is disabled until lookup, upload, or manual edits create pending updates.
No-op submit paths now show `Make a change before saving.` instead of silently closing the drawer.
Defer, dismiss, and cancel behavior remains independent of pending edits.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.10
releases.summary: This patch adds a compact pending-update readback to Dashboard Review drawers, so users can see what lookup, cover upload, or manual edits have staged before saving the record.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a `Pending updates` section to Dashboard Review drawers.
Derives pending rows by comparing the loaded media record with the current drawer form.
Shows staged title, year, format, cover, provider, and type-specific metadata values when they differ from the saved record.
Keeps assisted lookup, cover upload, known identity readback, manual details, defer/dismiss, and decision history behavior unchanged.
Preserved the drawer-first product rule: no standalone Review page or nav item.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.9
releases.summary: This patch adds a compact known-identity readback to Dashboard Review drawers, so users can see what collectZ already knows before deciding whether lookup, title cleanup, cover upload, or manual details are needed.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a `Known identity` section to Dashboard Review drawers.
Shows existing UPC/barcode, TMDB, ISBN, Google Books, provider, Kavita, and Plex-like identity values when present.
Shows a plain empty state when the record has no recognized identifier yet.
Kept assisted lookup, cover upload, manual details, defer/dismiss, and decision history behavior unchanged.
Preserved the drawer-first product rule: no standalone Review page or nav item.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.8
releases.summary: This patch adds recent review decision context to Dashboard Review drawers, so users can see prior defer, dismiss, and restore activity when a finding returns.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added recent Dashboard Review decision activity to review row payloads.
Added a compact `Recent review decisions` section to the Dashboard Review drawer.
Kept the history scoped to the same media item and finding type.
Preserved the drawer-first product rule: no standalone Review page or nav item.
Updated OpenAPI and source-contract coverage for review decision history.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.7
releases.summary: This patch makes Dashboard Review defer/dismiss decisions visible and reversible from the same Review panel, without adding a standalone Review page.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added active hidden review decisions to the Dashboard summary payload.
Added a scoped restore endpoint for Dashboard Review defer/dismiss decisions.
Added a compact collapsed `Hidden review items` section inside Dashboard Review.
Restoring a hidden item removes the decision and refreshes the Dashboard summary.
Added OpenAPI and source-contract coverage for hidden decision readback and restore behavior.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.6
releases.summary: This patch makes Dashboard Review drawers better at steering users toward title cleanup and assisted enrichment before asking for manual provider identifiers.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added backend review clue fields for suggested lookup title, lookup context, and next action.
Cleaned obvious file/import noise from assisted lookup titles before they reach Dashboard Review.
Prefilled Dashboard Review lookup fields with backend review guidance when opening a row.
Added a drawer action to copy the search text into the record title when the title itself is the likely problem.
Kept manual identifier fields available as fallback controls.
Updated OpenAPI and source-contract coverage for the new review guidance fields.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.5
releases.summary: This patch adds scoped defer and dismiss actions to Dashboard Review drawers so legitimate `not now` and `not needed` items can be handled without creating a separate Review page.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added `media_review_decisions` to track Dashboard Review decisions by media item and finding type.
Dashboard Review counts and row samples now hide active deferred or dismissed findings.
Deferred findings are hidden for seven days.
Dismissed findings are hidden until the underlying media row changes.
Added drawer actions for `Defer 7 days` and `Dismiss` beside the existing save controls.
Added an authenticated `POST /api/dashboard/review-decisions` endpoint and OpenAPI contract.
Added source-contract coverage for migration/init parity, endpoint shape, PAT scope behavior, and UI controls.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.4
releases.summary: This patch makes Dashboard Review Missing IDs drawers more specific to the item being reviewed instead of showing the same generic search controls for every media type.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added type-specific lookup guidance in Dashboard Review drawers.
Movie and TV review rows now keep TMDB search with year context.
Book review rows now show Google Books search with author context.
Comic review rows now show comic issue search without a misleading year field.
Audio review rows now show Discogs search with artist context.
Game review rows now show game search with platform context when available.
Kept manual identifier fields available as fallback controls.
Updated browser and unit source-contract coverage for the drawer search surface.

releases.title: collectZ v3.12.3
releases.summary: This patch tunes Dashboard Review's Missing IDs rules so barcode-backed books, movies, and TV records are no longer treated as needing manual provider identifiers.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Treats UPC/barcode as a useful identity for books when deciding whether a row belongs in `Review > IDs`.
Treats UPC/barcode as a useful identity for movies and TV rows when TMDB or Plex identity is absent.
Keeps physical audio and physical game UPC expectations intact.
Keeps comic issue identity behavior unchanged.
Adds unit coverage and runtime proof checks so UPC-bearing books, movies, and TV rows do not regress back into Missing IDs.
Adds the broader Dashboard Review rules and drawer-first resolution track to the backlog so future review work stays anchored in Dashboard rows and drawers.
